source_pr.title: test: fix data race in distsql/select_result
source_pr.body:
### What problem does this PR solve?

Problem Summary:
```

[2020-06-16T12:15:56.617Z] WARNING: DATA RACE

[2020-06-16T12:15:56.617Z] Read at 0x00c0453ab710 by goroutine 744:

[2020-06-16T12:15:56.617Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/distsql.(*selectResult).Close()

[2020-06-16T12:15:56.617Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/distsql/select_result.go:287 +0xfa

[2020-06-16T12:15:56.617Z]   github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor.closeAll()

[2020-06-16T12:15:56.617Z]       /home/jenkins/agent/workspace/tidb_ghpr_unit_test/go/src/github.com/pingcap/tidb/executor/distsql.go:118 +0x118
```

### What is changed and how it works?

What's Changed:
- use atomic value to eliminate race

### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- Unit test

### Release note <!-- bugfixes or new feature need a release note -->

- No release note

symptoms: PR title: fix data race in distsql/select_result.

fix_pattern: test: fix data race in distsql/select_result

evidence: evidence: PR title: fix data race in distsql/select_result.
evidence: diff makes selectRespSize atomic (Store/Load/Swap) to avoid concurrent access races (distsql/select_result.go).
